title: Moeve Becomes the First External SAF Supplier to Join Avelia
content: The agreement marks a significant step forward in Aveliaâ€™s evolution, supporting its objective to help scale SAF and make it a more commercially viable solution for decarbonising aviation. Moeve joining Avelia supports the platformâ€™s evolution into a multi-supplier industry solution, helping users access the GHG benefits of SAF from multiple SAF suppliers including Shell. By leveraging the book and claim model, the Avelia platform aims to reduce the life cycle greenhouse gas (GHG) aviation emissions** and enable greater participation in the sectorâ€™s decarbonisation efforts. The platform provides wider access to the GHG benefits of SAF across the aviation value chain. This agreement supports Moeveâ€™s Positive Motion strategy by promoting greater SAF adoption as the market evolves, helping to make it a more commercially viable solution for advancing the energy transition. As of June 30 2025, Avelia helped inject over 41 million gallons of SAF into the existing fuel network at 17 airport injection point locations around the world, helping to abate over 370,000 tCO2e. 57 corporations and airlines have made transactions through Avelia.
author: Analysts Account
